headline: Generac and EPC Power to Deploy Fully Integrated Energy Solutions for Data Center Applications
summary: Generac Power Systems (NYSE: GNRC), a leading U.S.-based global designer and manufacturer of power generation and energy storage products and solutions, and EPC Power Corp., a leading U.S.-based manufacturer of advanced grid-forming power conversion systems, today announced their engagement to deploy fully integrated energy solutions for the data center market. headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Generac Holdings (GNRC) After Its Recent Share Price Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Generac Holdings at around US$220 per share still offers value, this article walks through what the current price might be implying about the business. The stock has been volatile recently, with a 6.6% decline over the last 7 days, a 29.2% return over the past month, and year to date and 1 year returns of 56.5% and 69.8% respectively. The 3 year return sits at 81.9%, and the 5 year return at a 29.8% decline. Recent headlines around Generac have focused on broader...
